entity.name: Demir Ajvazi
entity.description: Blind software developer from Serbia. I use JAWS screen reader as my primary interface with a computer. I built Ultra Creative Suite because no professional video editor in the world works properly with a screen reader.

projects.name: Ultra Creative Suite
projects.description: The world's first professional video editor built from the ground up for blind, low-vision, and sighted users. Every feature — timeline editing, AI video creation, 4K GPU rendering — is fully accessible via JAWS and NVDA screen readers. The AI Video Creator transcribes song lyrics using Whisper AI, automatically downloads matching stock footage, and renders a complete music video in 4K, entirely controllable through a screen reader. Built in C# / WPF / .NET 8. Over 300 million people are blind or severely visually impaired worldwide. Before this project, none of them had a professional creative tool built for them.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors — support directly on GitHub

plans.name: General Development Support
plans.description: Covers API credits for Pixabay and Freesound stock media used by the AI Video Creator, storage and testing infrastructure for 4K rendering and local AI model processing, and a professional JAWS accessibility audit before public release.
